testcase.name: test_add_to_cart_duplicate_item
testcase.failure: AssertionError: Adding the same item twice should increment quantity. Expected cart item quantity: 2 Actual cart item quantity: 1 Cart state: [{"sku": "ITEM-001", "quantity": 1}]

testcase.name: test_add_to_cart_max_quantity
testcase.failure: AssertionError: Adding more than 99 units of a single item should raise ValidationError. No error was raised. Cart accepted quantity: 150 This may allow customers to exceed inventory limits.

testcase.name: test_cart_item_quantity
testcase.failure: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'quantity' Cart item was None after add_to_cart() returned success. Possible race condition in cart_service.add() when session expires mid-request. Traceback: File "tests/cart/test_cart_service.py", line 47, in test_cart_item_quantity assert item.quantity == 1

testcase.name: test_remove_nonexistent_item
testcase.failure: AssertionError: Removing a non-existent item should raise ItemNotFoundError. Got KeyError instead: 'ITEM-999' Error handling contract broken. Callers catching ItemNotFoundError will miss this.

testcase.name: test_update_cart_quantity_zero

failure.message: AssertionError: expected item removal, cart still contains item with quantity 0

testcase.name: test_apply_expired_promo_code

failure.message: AssertionError: expected PromoExpiredError, expired promo was applied

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Applying an expired promo code should raise PromoExpiredError. Promo SAVE20 expired 2024-01-01 was accepted and discount applied. Customers could exploit this to receive unauthorized discounts.

testcase.name: test_cart_concurrent_updates
testcase.error: ConnectionError: database connection pool exhausted Max pool size: 10 Active connections: 10 Waiting requests: 47 This occurs under concurrent load. Pool size may need tuning or connection leak exists in cart_service.update_quantity(). Traceback: File "tests/cart/test_persistence.py", line 89, in test_cart_concurrent_updates results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)

testcase.name: test_cart_database_timeout
testcase.error: TimeoutError: database query exceeded 5000ms threshold Query: SELECT * FROM cart_items WHERE session_id = ? AND user_id = ? Execution time: 5012ms Missing index on (session_id, user_id) composite key likely cause.

testcase.name: test_cart_large_order

error.message: AssertionError: checkout rejected cart with 11 items, BUG-001 regression

testcase.error: AssertionError: Checkout should accept carts with more than 10 items. Cart item count: 11 HTTP response: 400 Bad Request Response body: {"error": "cart_item_limit_exceeded", "limit": 10} This is a confirmed regression of BUG-001: checkout fails when cart has more than 10 items.

skipped.message: Legacy cart schema migration deprecated, skipping until v3 migration complete
